name: Standard Meeting Notes
description: A comprehensive meeting record covering all topics discussed and action items.

sections.title: TLDR
sections.instruction: Summarize the entire meeting in no more than 5 bullet points. Each bullet must capture a distinct key takeaway, outcome, or decision. Be specific — no generic filler.

sections.title: Topics Covered
sections.instruction: For EACH distinct topic that received any discussion, create a sub-heading with the topic name, followed by a complete, detailed record of everything said about that topic — every point raised, every opinion shared, every question asked, every answer given, every piece of context, every specific number or name mentioned. This is a verbatim record, not a summary. Nothing should be omitted or compressed. A longer, more complete record is always preferred over a shorter one.

sections.title: Next Steps & Action Items
sections.instruction: List every next step and action item identified in the meeting. For each, describe the action clearly and specifically. Include any deadline or timeline mentioned. Do NOT try to assign owners — focus entirely on what needs to be done, not who should do it.
